label: Preference learning

node.label: Preference learning
node.definition: Pairwise rankings or comparative judgments teach which outputs or behaviors are preferred.
node.why_it_matters: In this atlas graph, Preference learning is modeled as depending on Supervised learning, Labels, targets, rewards & preferences and feeding downstream nodes such as Margin, ranking & metric objectives, Reward modeling, Preference optimization (RLHF, DPO families).
examples: atlas downstream link to Margin, ranking & metric objectives
atlas downstream link to Reward modeling
atlas downstream link to Preference optimization (RLHF, DPO families)
limitations: The chosen learning signal and interaction pattern may not match the deployment objective or data-generating process. Its direct dependencies include Supervised learning, Labels, targets, rewards & preferences.

dependencies.rationale: Preference learning follows the learning setup expressed by Supervised learning.

In this atlas graph, Preference learning has a `uses` dependency on Labels, targets, rewards & preferences because Labels, targets, rewards & preferences is modeled as a reusable ingredient for the node.
In this atlas graph, Preference learning has a `uses` dependency on Game theory & decision theory because Game theory & decision theory is modeled as a reusable ingredient for the node.
